emails.subject: Midway Project - Generic Interconnect Agreement
emails.body: Kay Christi: We need to get a law firm reviewing this agreement as soon as possible. As Christi has worked with several on past projects, I thought she could help. Please let me know how we should proceed. Thanks, Ben Forwarded by Ben Jacoby/HOU/ECT on 05/21/2001 02:57 PM Greg Krause@ENRON 05/21/2001 04:00 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: Midway Project - Generic Interconnect Agreement
emails.body: Re: FW: Midway Project Generic Interconnect Agreement I'm available any time Friday, and tomorrow afternoon is fine, especially after 230. Kay
